I'd recommend to submit this from a separate branch so that it could land independently of the other change, unless there is some reason they are dependent on each other?

commit.message:
LU-11169 obdclass: fix old return code usage

obd_commitrw function which parent error code
replaced with result of exp_check_ops function.
